tasks.title: Add main-project-mutex helper + unit tests
tasks.description: New in-memory async mutex per main project path with rejection-safe Promise-chain pattern and soft 30s/60s warn-not-throw.
tasks.planSection: Architektur D1 + Phase A; Test Strategy main-project-mutex.test.ts

tasks.title: Tune kanban-lock + module-init invariant + sync CI test
tasks.description: Set timeouts 15s/20s/100ms+jitter in both kanban-lock copies, add module-init invariant assert, add byte-equality CI test.
tasks.planSection: Architektur D2 + Phase A; Test Strategy kanban-lock-sync.test.ts + extended kanban-lock.test.ts

tasks.title: commitMainKanbanIfDirty async + dual-locked
tasks.description: Convert function to async; wrap body in withMainProjectLock (outer) + withKanbanLock (inner); update sole caller to await.
tasks.planSection: Architektur D3 + Phase B; Komponenten-Verbindung Source main-project-mutex.ts → worktree-story.ts

tasks.title: mergeStoryBranchIntoSpec wrapped in main-project mutex
tasks.description: Wrap entire mergeStoryBranchIntoSpec body in withMainProjectLock keyed on path.resolve(projectPath).
tasks.planSection: Architektur D4 + Phase B; Komponenten-Verbindung Source main-project-mutex.ts → workflow-executor.ts

tasks.title: Post-merge purgeShadowSpecMutables call wrapped
tasks.description: Wrap onItemCompleted post-merge spec-worktree purge in withMainProjectLock keyed on this.mainProjectPath.
tasks.planSection: Architektur D5 + Phase B; Komponenten-Verbindung Source main-project-mutex.ts → auto-mode-spec-orchestrator.ts

tasks.title: setupSpecWorktree auto-commit wrapped
tasks.description: Wrap setupSpecWorktree pre-worktree git add -A + commit block in withMainProjectLock with label setup-auto-commit.
tasks.planSection: Architektur D6 + Phase B; Komponenten-Verbindung Source main-project-mutex.ts → workflow-executor.ts

tasks.title: onItemFailed cleanliness gate parity
tasks.description: Mirror isWorktreeClean gate from onItemCompleted into onItemFailed; surface incident and halt on dirty worktree.

tasks.title: setup-mcp.sh gitignore installer
tasks.description: Append idempotent gitignore block for kanban.json + kanban-board.md + backlog-index.json to project .gitignore via setup-mcp.sh.

tasks.description: New parallel-completion.test.ts + extend pam-005-worktree-helpers + add onItemFailed cleanliness regression test.
